manifest.description: Browse and review files linked to Paperclip issues. Manage a review queue, approve or reject files, and keep a full review history — all from within Paperclip.
manifest.author: Paperclip AI Agents

seedExampleFiles.title: Seed Example Files
seedExampleFiles.description: Create 3 example files (deploy.sh, config.yml, README.md) on first load. Useful for testing. Disable for clean installs.

defaultFlagForReview.title: Flag New Files for Review
defaultFlagForReview.description: When enabled, newly registered files are automatically added to the Review Queue.

autoIndexDocuments.title: Auto-Index Issue Documents
autoIndexDocuments.description: Automatically discover and register all issue documents on plugin startup. New documents are added each time the plugin restarts.

maxFilesPerPage.title: Files Per Page
maxFilesPerPage.description: Maximum number of files shown in the sidebar list.
